# SPEC: scarecrow website
<!-- generated by brainstorm skill -->

## Overview
Scarecrowの個人WebサイトをNext.jsで構築する。デザイン参考画像の暗い作業部屋、紙、ランタン、手描きキャラクターの雰囲気を反映し、noteの記事をRSSから取得して表示する。

## Mode
NEW

## Targets
- Files:
  - `src/app/page.tsx`
  - `src/app/logs/page.tsx`
  - `src/app/projects/page.tsx`
  - `src/app/about/page.tsx`
  - `src/app/layout.tsx`
  - `src/app/globals.css`
  - `src/lib/note.ts`
  - `src/data/projects.ts`
  - `tests/site.test.js`
- Interfaces:
  - Home page `/`
  - Logs page `/logs`
  - Projects page `/projects`
  - About page `/about`
  - `getNoteArticles()`

## Behavior

### Normal Cases
| Input / State | Expected Output / State |
|---|---|
| User opens `/` | Hero, latest logs, projects, philosophy/about summary are visible |
| User opens `/logs` | note RSS articles are listed in newest-first order |
| User opens `/projects` | project cards are visible |
| User opens `/about` | Scarecrow profile and external links are visible |
| `NOTE_RSS_URL` is unset | RSS URL defaults to `https://note.com/scarecorow0222/rss` |
| note RSS fetch succeeds | Article title, link, date, excerpt, optional image are normalized |
| note RSS fetch fails | Empty article list is returned and the UI still renders |

### Error / Boundary Cases
| Input / State | Expected Output / Error |
|---|---|
| RSS item has no thumbnail | A text-only article card is rendered without crashing |
| RSS item has HTML description | Description is stripped to plain text excerpt |
| RSS feed has more than display limit | Home shows latest 3, logs page can show a longer list |

## Constraints / Non-Functional Requirements
- Use Next.js App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS.
- Vercel deployable configuration.
- Keep the first release focused: static pages plus server-side note RSS display.
- Visual direction follows `docs/design/site-image.png` and `docs/design/scarecrow-image.png`, but does not need to pixel-match.
- Avoid client-side secrets. note RSS URL can be public.
- Tests must pass before completion.

## Out Of Scope
- note OAuth or authenticated note APIs.
- Full CMS authoring inside this website.
- Contact form backend.
- Project detail pages.
- Complex animation system.

## Existing Test Impact
- Existing tests: none.
- Add tests in `tests/site.test.js`.

---

# Implementation Plan

## Tasks

### Task #1: Project scaffold and shared layout
- Test type: NEW
- Target: Next.js app structure
- Test cases:
  - Normal: required files and scripts exist
  - Normal: page source contains navigation labels
- Implementation:
  - Add `package.json`, Next config, TypeScript config, Tailwind/PostCSS config.
  - Add App Router layout, global styles, and shared navigation/footer.
- Impact files:
  - `package.json`
  - `next.config.mjs`
  - `tsconfig.json`
  - `tailwind.config.ts`
  - `postcss.config.mjs`
  - `src/app/layout.tsx`
  - `src/app/globals.css`
  - `tests/site.test.js`

### Task #2: note RSS normalization
- Test type: NEW
- Target: `src/lib/note.ts`
- Test cases:
  - Normal: RSS XML is parsed into normalized article objects
  - Boundary: HTML descriptions are stripped
  - Error: failed fetch returns an empty array
- Implementation:
  - Use `fast-xml-parser` to parse RSS.
  - Export `NOTE_RSS_URL` and `getNoteArticles`.
  - Keep parsing logic separately testable.
- Impact files:
  - `src/lib/note.ts`
  - `tests/site.test.js`

### Task #3: Home, logs, projects, about pages
- Test type: NEW
- Target: route files
- Test cases:
  - Normal: each route renders the expected core copy
  - Normal: logs page uses note article data
  - Boundary: empty logs state renders helpful text
- Implementation:
  - Add page components.
  - Add static project data.
  - Use design assets from `docs/design` by copying selected image assets into `public/images`.
- Impact files:
  - `src/app/page.tsx`
  - `src/app/logs/page.tsx`
  - `src/app/projects/page.tsx`
  - `src/app/about/page.tsx`
  - `src/data/projects.ts`
  - `public/images/*`
  - `tests/site.test.js`

## Execution Strategy
- Test framework: Node.js built-in test runner plus React-free unit checks for source and parser behavior.
- Test command: `npm test`.
- Build verification: `npm run build`.
- Regression: required after each GREEN.
- Estimated tasks: 3.

## Risks / Notes
- Network is restricted in the local environment, so dependency installation may require approval.
- note RSS shape can change. Parser should be defensive.
- `docs/design/scarecrow-image.png` is a sprite/reference sheet, so first release can use it as a visual motif rather than extracting individual sprites.
